assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — exactly matches the original in claude-md-configured.md line 16.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new entry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 12-16 match claude-md-configured.md lines 20-24 exactly: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has '## Preserved (no modifications)' section listing trustify-backend, all Jira fields, and Code Intelligence content as preserved. Has '## Added (new entries)' section listing trustify-ui and serena_ui limitation as added.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 2 lines 17-18: '1. **serena_backend** -- already in Repository Registry (skipped)' and '2. **serena_ui** -- NOT in Repository Registry (new)'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-33 preserve the naming convention ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name'), the serena_backend example (mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol), and the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use') verbatim from the original. The only addition is line 34: '- `serena_ui`: No limitations known'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 8: 'No existing ## Security Configuration section found in CLAUDE.md. Offered the user the option to enable security triage. User declined. Security Configuration section was not added.' changes-log.md '## Not Added (user declined)' section confirms offer and decline. claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section.
